content.cn_text: 杰辛塔:嗨，刘易斯，我是杰辛塔
content.en_text: Jacinta: Hi, Lewis it's Jacmta here

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:哦。嗨,杰西塔。我正想给你打电话呢我在想我们去皇后镇旅行的住宿问题
content.en_text: Lewis: Oh. hi, Jacinta. I was just going to call you I was thinking we ought to do something about accommodation for our trip to Queenstown

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:对，实际上这就是我打电话给你的原因，我在网上查了一下，有一个地方看起来不错，叫旅行者旅馆，但是当我查一月份我们计划去的时候，我发现它已经被订满了。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Yeah, actually that's just why I rang you I've been looking on the Internet - there was one place that looked OK called Travellers' Lodge, but when I checked availability for January when we're planning to go I found it was fully booked.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:好吧，我想我们现在最好做点什么。
content.en_text: Lewis: Right - well, we'd better do something now I suppose.

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:实际上我们在电脑上有一个清单，有一个叫宾格利的地方看起来可能，每晚19.75美元，也就是美元，他们报的价格都是美元。
content.en_text: Jacinta: We've actually got a list up here on the computer, there's one place called Bimgley's that looks possible, it's 19.75 dollars a night that's US dollars, they quote all the prices in US dollars.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:大约是26或27新西兰元。没关系。那是在宿舍里，是吗?
content.en_text: Lewis: So that's about 26 or 27 New Zealand dollars. That's OK. That'll be in a dormitory, is it?

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:对，他们说有8张床的宿舍，旅馆就在市中心，那里有咖啡厅，每个周末都有主题之夜，不管那是什么意思……
content.en_text: Jacinta: Yeah they say 8-bed dorms .And the hostel's right in the town centre and they've got a cafe, they have theme nights every weekend, whatever that means ...

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:哦，你知道，比如某些食物和音乐，人们可能会穿特殊的衣服，就像我们去年参加的那个埃及之夜一样
content.en_text: Lewis: Oh, you know, like certain sorts of food and music and people might wear special clothes like that Egyptian evening we went to last year

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:哦，好。还有什么呢，他们有一个日光浴区，还有所有平常的东西，上网等等。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Oh, OK. What else, they've got a sundeck area, and then all the usual things Internet access and so on.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:听起来不错。还有别的地方吗?
content.en_text: Lewis: Sounds good. Was there anywhere else?

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:对，还有几个地方。有一种叫做“小木屋”，只要18美元，这是12张床的宿舍里的一张床。他们也有单人房和家庭房。它看起来好像有点出城，据说它有一个高山环境……一个“安静”的高山环境。你觉得呢?
content.en_text: Jacinta: Yeah, a couple more places. There's one called Chalet Lodge which is just 18.00 US dollars, that's for a bed in a 12-bed dorm. They do single and family rooms as well. It looks as if it's a bit out of town, says it's got an alpine setting ... a ' quiet' alpine setting. What do you think?

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:嗯，不确定……
content.en_text: Lewis: Mmm, not sure ..

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:哦，不过实际上并不远……上面写着从镇上走10分钟，所以…哦，它说它是“儿童友好”。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Oh, but actually it's not far out at all .. it says 10 minutes' walk from town, so ...Oh, and it says it's ' children friendly'.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:嗯。我对此不太确定。第三名呢?
content.en_text: Lewis: Mmm. I'm not so sure about that. What about the third place?

content.cn_text: 杰西塔:啊。那叫环球旅行者，让我想想，他们有私人房间，或者5张床的宿舍，18.50美元，在市中心，就在湖边，包括早餐
content.en_text: Jacinta: Aah. That's called Globetrotters let's see, they do private rooms, or 5-bed dorms for 18.50 - it's in the centre, just by the lake and that includes breakfast

content.cn_text: 路易斯:另外两个不是吗?
content.en_text: Lewis: Didn't the other two?

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:我不这么认为。他们没提过，所以可能没提过。哦，上面还说有免费跳伞…哇!
content.en_text: Jacinta: I don't think so. They didn't mention it, so probably not. Oh, and it says something about a free skydive .. wow!

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:我不知道我是不是那么热衷于从飞机上跳下来……
content.en_text: Lewis: Don't know if I'm all that keen on lumping out of aeroplanes..

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:哦，实际上上面说的是你可以赢得一次跳伞的机会，他们每天都会给一位客人一次机会。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Oh, actually what it says is you can win a chance to do a skydive they give one away every day to one of the guests.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:嗯，如果我赢了，你也可以。不管怎样，他们还有地方吗?
content.en_text: Lewis: Well, if I win it, you can do it. Anyway, do they have room?

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:对，我查过了。我可以在那里预订吗?
content.en_text: Jacinta: Yeah, I checked the availability. Shall I go ahead and book there then?

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:好。
content.en_text: Lewis: Fine.

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:我也在看有什么可做的……有很多网站提供冒险运动的优惠啊，我想我们得去蹦极。
content.en_text: Jacinta: I was looking at what there is to do, too .. there are lots of sites offering deals for adventure sports ah, I suppose we have to do a bungee jump.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:为什么?
content.en_text: Lewis: Why?

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:嗯，在皇后镇，人们开始把跳舞作为一项运动。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Well, it's Queenstown where they more or less started it as a sport.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:你可以。如果你真的想用松紧带绑住脚踝从桥上跳下去……我要看
content.en_text: Lewis: You can . If you really want to jump off the side of a bridge with an elastic rope tied round your ankles... I'll watch

content.cn_text: 杰西塔:好。那你想做什么?
content.en_text: Jacinta: OK. So what do you want to do?

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:就冒险运动而言?我和一个在那里玩激流漂流的人聊过，他说那里真的很棒。他们载着你沿着肖托夫河逆流而上，然后你坐上橡胶筏，穿过激流，河水又窄又急，最后穿过一条近200米长的隧道。不过我觉得挺贵的。
content.en_text: Lewis: As far as adventure sports go? I was talking to someone who went white-water rafting there he said it was really awesome. They drive you up the Shotover River and then you come down on a rubber raft through the white-water rapids, where the river's really narrow and fast, and end up going through a tunnel nearly 200 metres long. I think it's quite expensive, though.

content.cn_text: 杰西塔:哦。如果你愿意，我也愿意。
content.en_text: Jacinta: Oh. I'm on for that if you are.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:酷!
content.en_text: Lewis: Cool!

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:另一种方法是乘坐快艇，不过听起来噪音很大。基本上就是一艘非常快的船在河上飞驰，不是吗?
content.en_text: Jacinta: The other thing you can do is the jet-boat ride that sounded just a lot of noise though. It's basically just whizzing round on the river on a very fast boat, isn't it?

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:我朋友也去了，他说那里有点像旅游景点，但值得一去。我会试试的。你径直走到河的峡谷。他说司机技术很好，但我不介意自己去。
content.en_text: Lewis: My friend did that as well - hp said it was a bit touristy but worth it. I'll give it a go. You go right up the river canyon. He said the drivers were really skillful, But I don't mind going on my own.

content.cn_text: 雅辛塔:除了商业冒险之外，还有很多事情要做，我们应该去徒步旅行。那里的景色太美了，我不想错过。开始的地方是格兰诺奇，显然大约40分钟的车程，那里是许多荒野小径的起点。
content.en_text: Jacinta: But there's lots to do as well as the whole commercial adventure bit, we ought to do some trekking. The scenery round there's amazing, I don't want to miss that. The place to start's Glenorchy, apparently about 40 minutes' drive, that's where lots of the wilderness trails begin.

content.cn_text: 刘易斯:好的，我去收拾我的步行靴。我最好开始接受训练……几个月来，我除了坐在办公桌前什么也没做。现在。还有什么需要我们做的吗
content.en_text: Lewis: OK, I'll pack my walking boots. I'd better start getting in training ... I haven't done anything except sit at my desk for months. Now. is there anything else we

content.cn_text: 需要决定吗?
content.en_text: need to decide?

groups.desc:
Questions 1-6
Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Budget accommodation in Queenstown, New Zealand

content:
• in town centre 
• cafe with regular $15731$nights 
• sundeck

• located in a $15732$alpine setting 
• 10 mins from town centre 
•  $15733$are welcome

• in town centre 
•  $15734$included 
• chance to win a$15735$

items.analysis: 这道题的答案是19.75美元，因为原文明确提到Bingley's的价格是"19.75 dollars a night"。虽然后面提到了"26或27新西兰元"，但这是对美元价格的换算，而不是原价。题目要求填写的是美元价格，因此正确答案应该是19.75。这道题考察了学生的细节辨别能力和对货币单位的理解。学生需要注意区分不同货币，并准确捕捉原文中提到的具体数字。此外，学生还应该注意听到酒店名称后紧随其后的信息，因为这往往包含了重要的细节，如价格等。

因为题目要求填写Bingley's的一项特色活动，而原文中明确提到"they have theme nights every weekend"。这里的"theme nights"（主题之夜）是一个定期举行的活动，符合题目要求。虽然原文也提到了咖啡厅（cafe），但咖啡厅是一个固定设施，不是一项活动。因此，正确答案应该是"theme"。此外，"theme nights"这个表达在英语中是常见的，通常指的是有特定主题的活动夜晚，如音乐主题夜、电影主题夜等，这进一步确认了答案的正确性。

这道题的关键在于准确捕捉Chalet Lodge的描述。文中提到它有一个"alpine setting"，这是一个重要的信号词，引出了我们需要的信息。紧接着，说话者具体描述了这个环境是"quiet"的。这个形容词"quiet"就是我们需要填入表格的答案。之所以选择"quiet"而不是"alpine"，是因为题目要求我们描述这个alpine setting的特征。"quiet"更准确地描述了这个环境的特点，而"alpine"只是说明了环境的类型。此外，"quiet"这个词在原文中是被引号强调的，表明它是一个重要的描述词。因此，"quiet"是最适合填入表格的答案。

这道题的关键在于准确捕捉Chalet Lodge的描述信息。文中提到Chalet Lodge是"children friendly"，这直接对应了表格中需要填写的空白。"children"是正确答案，因为题目要求填写的是被欢迎的对象，而不是描述性词语。虽然你可能会听到"friendly"这个词，但重点是要理解哪类人群是受欢迎的。此外，注意听力材料中的细节描述，特别是在提到特定住宿地点后紧随的信息。这种类型的题目考察了你对细节的关注能力和从描述性短语中提取关键信息的技能。

这道题的关键在于准确识别Globetrotters宿舍的特点。听力原文中明确提到"that includes breakfast"，这里的"includes"是一个重要的信号词，表明早餐是包含在住宿费用中的。在住宿描述中，"breakfast included"通常是一个重要的附加服务，因此这是填入表格的正确答案。注意，虽然原文还提到了其他信息，如位置和价格，但题目特别要求填写的是包含的服务，所以"breakfast"是最符合要求的答案。做这类题目时，要特别注意听辨表示"包含"或"提供"的词语，如"includes"、"offers"等，这些词往往会引出重要的附加服务信息。

items.answer: skydive / sky-dive / free skydive / free sky-dive
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于准确理解原文中的信息。文中提到Globetrotters提供"win a chance to do a skydive"的机会，这意味着客人可以赢得一次免费跳伞的机会。虽然原文没有直接使用"free skydive"这个词组，但"win a chance"和"give one away every day"清楚地表明这是一个免费的机会。因此，答案"(free) sky(-)dive"是对原文信息的准确概括。注意，括号中的"free"是可选的，因为"win a chance"已经暗示了这是免费的。同时，"sky-dive"中的连字符也是可选的，因为both "skydive"和"sky-dive"都是正确的拼写。作为学生，你需要注意听取这种细节信息，并能够准确地将听到的内容概括为简洁的答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
Who wants to do each of the activities below?

items.title: bungee jump
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A（only Jacinta），因为对话中Jacinta表现出对蹦极跳感兴趣，而Lewis明确表示他只会观看。Jacinta说"I suppose we have to do a bungee jump"，表示她认为应该尝试蹦极。而Lewis回应说"You can. If you really want to jump off the side of a bridge with an elastic rope tied round your ankles... I'll watch"，明确表示他不会参与，只会观看。这清楚地表明只有Jacinta想要进行蹦极跳。

items.title: white-water rafting
items.analysis: 文中Lewis首先提到了白水漂流，说他的朋友觉得这项活动很棒。Jacinta随后表示"I'm on for that if you are"，意味着她也愿意参加。Lewis回应"Cool!"，表示同意。这两句话明确显示了两个人都对白水漂流感兴趣，因此正确答案是C，即两人都想参加白水漂流活动。

items.title: jet-boat ride
items.analysis: 文中Lewis表示愿意尝试jet-boat ride，说"I'll give it a go"和"I don't mind going on my own"，而Jacinta则表现出对这项活动不感兴趣的态度。因此，只有Lewis想要参加jet-boat ride，所以答案是B（only Lewis）。

items.title: trekking on wilderness trail
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C（both Jacinta and Lewis），因为对话中清楚地表明Jacinta和Lewis都想参加wilderness trail trekking。Jacinta首先提出建议说"we ought to do some trekking"，使用"we"表示她希望和Lewis一起去。Lewis随后表示同意，说"OK, I'll pack my walking boots"，明确表示他也打算参与徒步活动。两人的态度都表示了对徒步的兴趣和参与意愿。
